## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- **Go Version**: [e.g. 1.26.1]
- **MusicLe Version**: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- **Terminal**: [e.g. Windows Terminal, iTerm2, gnome-terminal]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Logs
If applicable, paste relevant log output here.

```
Paste logs here
```

## Possible Solution
If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.
